target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Structural integrity is compromised; majority of walls are missing, roof is gone, and remaining brickwork is fragmented; consistent with 75-100% area damage per doctrinal definition.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed 75-100% area damage. The scene depicts the ruins of a brick structure with missing walls, collapsed roof, and fragmented masonry, consistent with the prior assessment. The functional impact is complete loss of structural integrity and operational capability.
